markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Tulsa wins the Tulsa vs Sacramento Republic professional USL Championship soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 4, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Tulsa vs Sacramento Republic professional USL Championship soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 4, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties). If the game ends in a tie, the market called "Tie" resolves to Yes. If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two weeks away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
